productName: hashbreak - Pre Rolls (Infused) - Sour Blue Mintz - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Sour Blue Mintz flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a cool, refreshing mint flavor, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
